trackMoneyOwe: Track the money you owe others.
noOneOwesYou: No one owes you money right now. Happy travels!
youDoNotOweAnyone: You do not owe anyone right now. Splendid job!
noTransactionsDesc: Start tracking trip costs by using the "Record Expense" button at the top.
automaticSettlementsDesc: All transactions listed are calculated based on your group expenses inside this trip workspace. Clicking "Remind" sends a clean instant push notification.
scanQrApp: Scan this QR image using your bank app to transfer the payment.
scanQrAnyApp: Scan the QR using any Thai Mobile Banking app to transfer exactly <1>฿{{amount}}</1>.
noPaymentDetailsDesc: {{name}} hasn't registered a PromptPay QR, PromptPay ID, or Bank Account yet. Please settle up offline, then click "Mark as Paid" below to record the payment.
receivingDetailsDesc: Provide your PromptPay ID or Bank Account info so others can settle up easily.
selectedChannelDesc: Only the selected channel will be shown to other users to settle up with you.
fillInAllBankFields: Fill in all Bank fields before saving.
providePromptPayIdOrQr: Provide a PromptPay ID or QR Code image.
uploadPromptPayQrFormat: PNG, JPG, or WEBP up to 5MB
errorReadQR: Failed to read QR image file
errorBankFields: All three bank fields (Bank Name, Account Number, and Account Holder Name) must be filled, or all left empty.
errorSelectMobileBanking: Cannot select Mobile Banking as your preferred receiving channel because your bank details are incomplete. Please fill in Bank Name, Account Number, and Account Holder Name.
errorSelectPromptPay: Cannot select PromptPay as your preferred receiving channel because your PromptPay details are incomplete. Please provide a PromptPay ID or upload a QR Code image.
